title: B Tech CSE Full Stack Development Course in Noida & Dehli
content: The School of Computing Science and Engineering introduces this program to provide high quality undergraduate education to the students with objective of preparing students for prolific careers in Full Stack Development. This program encompasses of both front and back end of web application development. it is helpful to design complete web application and development For Lateral Entry: Passed Diploma examination with at least 60% marks in any branch of Engineering and Technology. Or Passed B.Voc/3-year D.Voc.
